name: USP消音版 | 午夜行动
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been painted using a VariCamo patterned hydrographic. Rebuilding only comes in the wake of destruction
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器使用多变迷彩图案花纹进行了涂装。 没有毁灭，哪来重生
